ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device from which the data was collected */,
  "logging_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was logged */,
  "logging_sample" INTEGER /* Sample number within the logging session */,
  "accelerometer_timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the accelerometer data since device reboot */,
  "accelerometer_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration in Gs */,
  "accelerometer_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration in Gs */,
  "accelerometer_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration in Gs */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label or category for the data point */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point for tracking changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES data_labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "identifier_for_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor-specific identifier for the device */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the device is deployed */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of device */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last synced with the server */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the reading belongs to */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor reading was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor reading was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being tracked */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
